name: tender-writing-spec
description: Tender bid writing and revision skill for formal technical sections, implementation plans, and scoped proposal text.

interface.shortDescription: Draft and revise tender text without breaking scope
interface.longDescription: A focused writing plugin for formal tender and proposal documents. It helps an agent draft or revise technical sections, implementation plans, AI capability chapters, procurement explanations, and Word-based bid content while preserving document structure, pricing boundaries, and deployment assumptions.
defaultPrompt: Use Tender Writing Spec to draft one tender section and keep the original structure unchanged.
Revise this bid chapter so it matches the confirmed procurement scope and deployment boundary.
Insert an AI capability section into a Word-based tender without changing nearby heading hierarchy.
